claimText: At UC Berkeley, publicly-available information classified as Protection Level P1 may be freely used in generative AI tools.
evidenceSnippetOriginal: Publicly-available information (Protection Level P1) can be used in generative AI tools.

citation.citationTitle: Appropriate Use of Generative AI Tools | Office of Ethics, Risk, and Compliance Services
